ermangizer-modbus-encode.label: ERMANGIZER Modbus Encoder
ermangizer-modbus-encode.name: Name
ermangizer-modbus-encode.info:
Send a command object as msg.payload:
• { command: "start" } / "stop" / "reset_error"
• { command: "set_pressure", value: 3.5 } (bar)
• { write: "min_shutdown_freq", value: 30 }
• { read: "all" } / "monitoring" / ["output_frequency","pressure"]

Slave can be overridden per message via msg.payload.slave.
Output is a ready-to-send Modbus RTU frame (CRC included).
ermangizer-modbus-encode.tip: Builds ERMANGIZER Modbus RTU frames from human-friendly commands
